name: MALD-X DECOY
description: ADM-160 MALD-class miniature air-launched decoy. No warhead — the whole point is the radar signature. Onboard transponder + corner reflectors paint the decoy to enemy radar with the cross-section of a 4th-gen fighter (RCS ~12 m², fighter unit-class), so a SAM operator or hostile fighter sees a plausible inbound striker, expends a missile on the lure, and reveals their site. Cruise profile mimics a manned ingress: ~Mach 0.7 cruise, low altitude. Range ~900 km. Storm Shadow GLB is the visual stand-in until a dedicated MALD model lands.
